title.en: In vitro diagnostic test systems - Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing in managing diabetes mellitus.
standards.scope: In vitro diagnostic medical devices -- Requirements for blood-glucose monitoring systems for self-testing.

title.en: In vitro diagnostic medical devices - Information supplied by the manufacturer (labelling) - Part 1: Terms, definitions and general requirements

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for information supplied by the manufacturer of in vitro diagnostic medical devices.
standards.scope: IVD medical devices -- Information supplied by the manufacturer (labelling).

title.en: Medical laboratories - Requirements for quality and competence

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for quality and competence in medical laboratories, including pre-examination, examination and post-examination processes.
standards.scope: Medical laboratories -- Requirements for quality and competence.
